name: io.github.alexendros/proton-mail-mcp
description: Proton Mail MCP via Bridge (IMAP/SMTP) · 13 tools · dual transport stdio + HTTP.

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Hostname or IP of the Proton Mail Bridge (default: 127.0.0.1 for local, or container hostname in compose).

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_IMAP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: IMAP port exposed by Proton Mail Bridge (default: 1143).

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_SMTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: SMTP port exposed by Proton Mail Bridge (default: 1025).

environmentVariables.name: PROTON_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Bridge-generated app password (NOT your Proton account password).
